content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.8 WARN — Google Sign-In is offered (GoogleSignInButton, LoginView.swift) with no `ASAuthorizationAppleID` import or Sign in with Apple option anywhere in the project, and description.txt explicitly advertises "One-tap Google sign-in" as the sync method.
Pierre: Apple requires that apps offering third-party social login (Google, Facebook, etc.) also offer Sign in with Apple as an equivalent option, unless a documented exemption applies (e.g. enterprise-only apps, education apps using SSO required by the institution, or apps using only the company's own account system). Here there's no exemption pattern visible — this is a consumer recipe app syncing personal data via Google only, which is a classic 4.8 rejection case. Add a Sign in with Apple button alongside Google Sign-In before submission.
